MASTER MOTION CALENDAR ON AUG-19-2015 IN 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MIKA'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT GRANTED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. (206)

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1710.25 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MINNEAPOLIS COLLEGE OF ART & DESIGN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MIKA, CHRISTOPHER MARK $5,510.18 PRINCIPAL, $1,322.76 INTEREST, $225.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,057.94, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MIKA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED FROM SEPTEMBER 4, 2015 TO SEPTEMBER 18, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M., IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE PARTIES THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. PARTIES MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND OPPOSING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN SEPTEMBER 4, 2015, AT 4:00 PM. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; NOT REPORTED. =302/EG

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MIKA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO OCTOBER 9, 2015 AT 9:30 A.M. IN DEPT. 302, LAW & MOTION, PER THE AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH, CLERK: SEAN KANE, NOT REPORTED. (302/EHG)

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MIKA'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. THE DECLARATIONS OF MR. READ AND DEFENDANT SHOW THAT PROPER SERVICE OF THE MINNESOTA ACTION NEVER OCCURRED. SEE CCP 1710.40(A). ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Oct-09-2015 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. VIVIAN LEUNG LERCHE, ESQ., Tel No. 415-680-5731 specially appearing for the Plaintiff;
Defendant CHRISTOPHER MIKA, Tel No. 510-692-7374 appearing in pro per.

RULING - A R G U E D - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MIKA'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is granted. The declarations of Mr. Read and Defendant show that proper service of the Minnesota action never occurred. See CCP 1710.40(a). ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/HEK)

To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-18-2015 Continued To Oct-09-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MIKA'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is continued to October 9, 2015 at 9:30 a.m. in Dept. 302, Law & Motion, per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Sean Kane, Not Reported. (302/EHG)

To Vacate Judgment
Off Calendar Sep-04-2015 Continued To Sep-18-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT CHRISTOPHER MIKA'S Motion To Vacate Judgment is continued to September 18, 2015, to give parties the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Parties must deliver courtesy copies of the moving and opposing papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than September 4, 2015, at 4:00 pm. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Not reported. =302/eg
